title: elaphoglossum amplum
intro: Elaphoglossum amplum is a species of epiphytic fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, native to South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum amplum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and treat various skin conditions. The herbal preparations of Elaphoglossum amplum include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which are often used to treat various ailments.
